title: Island Fly
description: Give players creative-mode flight on their own island. Configurable per rank, game mode, and permission.
body:
# ✈️ Island Fly — Flight on Your Island

Let players fly on their own island. Perfect for building, decorating, and managing large islands without the hassle of scaffolding and ladders.

## Features

- **Per-island flight** — fly only within your island boundaries
- **Permission-based** — grant flight to specific ranks or as a reward
- **Auto-disable** — flight stops when leaving your island
- **Configurable** — fly speed, timeout, and cost settings
- **Works with all BentoBox game modes**

📦 Requires [BentoBox](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bentobox) + a game mode addon.
